---
title: "Instrument Exploration"
format: gfm
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
helper <- if (file.exists("analysis/_analysis_helpers.R")) "analysis/_analysis_helpers.R" else "../_analysis_helpers.R"
source(helper)
```

## Legacy comments

```{r legacy-comments, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_render_legacy_comments("15-construct-2001-measure-iv.R", caption = "Legacy Chunk 15: preliminary IV-strength exploration")
```

```{r deviation-note, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_deviation_note("The prose and exploratory code above are rendered from the legacy comments. The current tables below use target outputs from the active IV panel diagnostics rather than reproducing GUI inspection or a standalone dotplot in the build path.")
```

## Current targets-backed results

```{r iv-match-summary, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("diagnostics", "iv_panel_match_summary.csv"), "Current IV-panel match summary")
```

```{r iv-state-summary, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("diagnostics", "iv_panel_state_summary.csv"), "Current IV-panel state summary", max_rows = 30)
```

```{r iv-keyed-rows, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("diagnostics", "iv_summary_keyed_rows.csv"), "Current keyed IV summary rows", max_rows = 30)
```
